scripts.dev: bun run typecheck && bun run assets:build && bun --hot src/server.ts
scripts.build: bun run typecheck && bun run assets:build && bun build --target=bun --production --outdir=build/server src/server.ts
scripts.assets:build: bun run tailwind:build && bun run docs:styles && rm -rf public && bun build --target=browser --production --splitting --entry-naming='assets/[name]-[hash].[ext]' --chunk-naming='assets/[name]-[hash].[ext]' --asset-naming='assets/[name]-[hash].[ext]' --outdir=public src/main.tsx && bun src/write-index.ts
